text.value: Supressed messages file not found
An HTML fragment from the set [cross-version-analysis.xhtml, cross-version-analysis-inline.xhtml] is not included anywhere in the produced implementation guide
An HTML fragment from the set [dependency-table.xhtml, dependency-table-short.xhtml, dependency-table-nontech.xhtml] is not included anywhere in the produced implementation guide
The HTML fragment 'globals-table.xhtml' is not included anywhere in the produced implementation guide
There are no valid display names found for the code urn:iso:std:iso:3166#PE for language(s) 'es-PE'. The display is 'Peru' which is the default language display
There are no valid display names found for the code urn:iso:std:iso:3166#PE for language(s) 'es-PE'. The display is 'Peru' which is the default language display
Las URL canónicas deben ser URLs absolutas si no son fragmentos de referencias (SMARTImplementationGuide)
La URL Canónica 'SMARTImplementationGuide' no puede resolverse
There are no valid display names found for the code urn:iso:std:iso:3166#PE for language(s) 'es-PE'. The display is 'Peru' which is the default language display

The ImplementationGuide uses package hl7.fhir.uv.extensions.r4#5.1.0 released on 2024-04-27, but the most recent appropriate version is 5.2.0. This reference is getting old and the more recent version should be considered

The ImplementationGuide uses package hl7.fhir.uv.cql#1.0.0 released on 2024-05-31, but the most recent appropriate version is 2.0.0. This reference is getting old and the more recent version should be considered
La referencia al perfil 'SMARTImplementationGuide' no ha sido verificada ya que es desconocido, y el validador está configurado para no aceptar perfiles desconocidos
Este elemento no coincide con ninguna partición conocida defined in the profile http://hl7.org/fhir/uv/cpg/StructureDefinition/cpg-recommendationdefinition|2.0.0

There are multiple different potential matches for the url 'http://hl7.org/fhir/uv/cpg/StructureDefinition/cpg-recommendationdefinition'. It might be a good idea to fix to the correct version to reduce the likelihood of a wrong version being selected by an implementation/implementer, or use the [IG Parameter `pin-canonicals`](https://hl7.org/fhir/tools/CodeSystem-ig-parameters.html). Using version '2.0.0', found versions: 1.0.0 (from hl7.fhir.uv.cpg#1.0.0), 2.0.0 (from hl7.fhir.uv.cpg#2.0.0). Suggested fix: change the canonical reference from 'http://hl7.org/fhir/uv/cpg/StructureDefinition/cpg-recommendationdefinition' to 'http://hl7.org/fhir/uv/cpg/StructureDefinition/cpg-recommendationdefinition|2.0.0'
La URL no es válida porque '(La URL está vacía)':
Hyperlink at 'div/div/table/tr/td/ul/li/a' for '' is empty
